title: SOL 200pk Assorted Blue Plasters for Catering and First Aid - Strong Adhesion Detectable Plasters - Waterproof, Assorted Sizes, Protects Cuts from Dirt - Ideal for Kitchens, Food Prep, and Safety Kit
features: Waterproof Catering Solution - Our blue plasters are designed to withstand wet conditions, making them ideal for catering environments.
Quick First Aid - A must-have addition to your kit for catering or for everyday use. Be prepared for any minor cut or scrape with these first aid plasters.

Hygiene and Cleanliness - These blue assorted plasters are used to protect the cuts against dirt and germs. It also provide convenience and peace of mind that comes with being prepared for life's little mishaps.
Assorted Sizes - Our blue plasters waterproof catering pack includes a variety of sizes for different wound types. Also known as plasters fabric plasters for first aid kit.

Easy To See Plasters - Blue plasters are often used in food service and preparation industries. The blue color is easily distinguishable from most food items, making it easier to detect if a plaster has fallen off and may be present in the food.

Ensure Your Comfort with These Top Picks! 200 Assorted Blue Plaster Add To Basket 220pcs Fabric Plasters Add To Basket 110pcs Waterproof Plaster Add To Basket 220pcs Waterproof Plaster Add To Basket 110pcs Fabric Plasters Add To Basket 200pk Round Spot Plasters Add To Basket 24pk Blister Plasters Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 148 4.2 out of 5 stars 148 4.4 out of 5 stars 589 4.4 out of 5 stars 113 4.2 out of 5 stars 361 4.2 out of 5 stars 264 4.2 out of 5 stars 120 Price £6.79 £ 6 . 79 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £3.79 £ 3 . 79 £4.49 £ 4 . 49 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 Breathable Fabric ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Strong Adhesion ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Comfortable Fit ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Variety of Sizes ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Travel-Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Are these blue plasters suitable for use in catering environments? Yes, these blue plasters are waterproof and ideal for catering. They are designed to withstand wet conditions, ensuring strong adhesion during food preparation. What sizes of blue plasters are included in this pack? The pack contains assorted sizes: 75x50mm, 69x40mm, 72x22mm, 72x19mm, 38x38mm, and 40x19mm. This variety helps cover different wound types effectively. Why are blue plasters recommended for food service industries? The blue colour is easily visible, ensuring quick detection if a plaster dislodges. This helps prevent contamination and promotes safety during food preparation. Are these plasters sterile and safe to use on cuts? Yes, each plaster is sterile, offering hygienic protection against dirt and germs. They provide reliable coverage for minor wounds, ensuring peace of mind. Can these plasters be used outside of catering? Absolutely. These plasters are versatile, suitable for first aid kits at home, work, or travel. They adhere well to the skin, making them perfect for everyday use.
